Trait ToByteSlice

pub trait ToByteSlice {

    fn to_byte_slice(&self) -> &[u8] ⓘ;
}
Expand description

Allows conversion from supported Arrow types to a byte slice.

Required Methods§

fn to_byte_slice(&self) -> &[u8] ⓘ

Converts this instance into a byte slice
